title: Strata — an optimizing compiler to WebAssembly
description: A from-scratch optimizing compiler that turns a small C-like language into real WebAssembly bytecode in your browser: SSA, SCCP/GVN/LICM/DCE/inlining, if-conversion to branchless select, and a relooper backend. Does floating point from scratch, both directions: str(float) is a genuine Dragon4 shortest-round-trip formatter written in the language itself, and parse_float its correctly-rounded inverse. Now ships a full transcendental math library (exp/ln/log2/log10/sin/cos/tan/asin/acos/atan/atan2/sinh/cosh/tanh/pow/cbrt/hypot/fmod, plus sqrt/floor/round/…) written ONCE as a shared Strata kernel that the wasm backend compiles and the reference interpreter runs — so they agree bit-for-bit, and a dedicated oracle proves each is within ~1 ULP of libm. Plus a real f32 single-precision type lowered end to end to the wasm f32 opcodes (arithmetic, compare, conversions, f32[], f32 struct fields), structs with nested/recursive layouts and a null handle, 64-bit long → wasm i64 (BigInt-exact, hex/L literals, long[], str(long)), bit primitives (popcount/clz/ctz/rotl/rotr), do-while/switch, a string standard library with str[] (split/join), a step debugger, and a differential test suite proving the wasm matches a reference interpreter at every opt level. NEW: first-class functions — a fn(…)->R type whose values are real function pointers, called through a wasm function table and call_indirect, usable in variables/params/returns/struct-field vtables, with a devirtualization pass that turns provable indirect calls back into direct ones at -O1+; this unlocks genuine higher-order programming (map/reduce, a comparator sort, compose). NEWEST: arrays of function pointers — (fn(…)->…)[] via fn_array(n) — a real jump table / state machine, with function-table slot 0 reserved as a null funcref so an unset slot traps on call and fn == null is an observable 'is this wired up?' test; the flagship is a stack-based bytecode VM whose entire decode step is one table[op](vm, imm) lowering to call_indirect. All proven by the differential harness (716 checks across -O0..-O3). NEWEST: division/remainder by a constant — strength reduction that turns every `/ C` and `% C` (32- AND 64-bit) into the textbook multiply/shift/add sequences: power-of-two shifts with a round-toward-zero bias, and the signed magic-number multiply of Hacker's Delight, including a from-scratch 64-bit high-multiply synthesized purely from i64 ops since wasm has no mulhi. At -O1+ the hardware i32.div_s/i64.div_s opcodes vanish entirely, each rewrite an EXACT identity (never an approximation) proven bit-for-bit against the reference interpreter at every level and fuzzed over millions of dividends including INT_MIN/INT_MAX. NEWEST: MEMORY OPTIMIZATION — the first pass to reason about linear memory. An alias analysis (address → base SSA value + constant byte offset; same-base disjoint ranges proven non-aliasing, any different base conservatively may-alias) drives a forward available-memory dataflow (a MUST analysis, meet = intersection, iterated to a fixpoint) that does store→load forwarding (a field written then read back becomes the value), redundant-load elimination (the same element loaded twice loads once), dead-store elimination (a field overwritten before any read isn't stored) and silent-store elimination (writing a value a cell already holds is a no-op). Conservative by precondition — a call clears all facts, print is a read-only barrier, i8 byte stores are never forwarded — so it can only ever miss, never miscompile; a particle step()'s read-modify-write burst collapses from 8 memory ops to 1 at -O1, proven behaviour-preserving by the differential oracle. NEWEST: SROA — ESCAPE ANALYSIS + SCALAR REPLACEMENT OF AGGREGATES, the optimization that makes the record DISAPPEAR. Struct construction lowers to a first-class `alloc` IR op (the string runtime keeps the raw bump sequence, so a fresh allocation is never confused with a heap-pointer rewind — the exact soundness subtlety that blocked this before). Escape analysis traces each handle and every address derived from it by adding a constant: if it is only ever the base of its own field loads/stores — never stored, returned, compared, passed to a call, or merged through a phi — the record is provably private and aliases nothing, so each field is promoted out of memory by FULL CYTRON SSA CONSTRUCTION (dominance-frontier phi placement over the field's store sites + a dominator-tree rename), turning a field written before a branch into a phi at the merge and one accumulated in a loop into a loop-header phi. Because the handle provably aliases nothing, promotion forwards straight across calls — where the memory pass must stay conservative — and memopt now proves two distinct allocations disjoint. The 2D-vectors example at -O2 (helpers inlined) drops from 164 wasm instructions / 506 bytes to 12 / 139 — all four allocations and 21 memory ops gone — and a Particle step() melts to ZERO allocs and ZERO memory ops at -O1, conditional bounce writes and all. Every promotion an exact rewrite, proven bit-for-bit by the differential oracle. NEWEST: 128-BIT SIMD VECTORS — first-class data parallelism lowered to real wasm v128. Four shapes (int4=i32x4, float4=f32x4, long2=i64x2, double2=f64x2) are full value types: locals, parameters, return values, loop-carried phis, even a v128 typed-select out of if-conversion. Elementwise operators map one-to-one to the lane ops (f32x4.add/sub/mul/div, i32x4 add/sub/mul, whole-vector v128.and/or/xor/not for &|^~), with a builtin library for everything else: int4(a,b,c,d) / int4(x) splat, lane(v,k) / withlane(v,k,x) (constant lane immediates), hsum reduction, vmin/vmax/vsqrt/vabs, the six lanewise comparisons veq/vne/vlt/vle/vgt/vge that yield an integer mask, vselect(mask,a,b) (a bit-exact v128.bitselect), and to_float4/to_int4 (saturating f32x4↔i32x4 convert). The whole family flows untouched through the optimizer — GVN deduplicates lane ops, DCE drops dead vectors, the stackifier folds single-use vectors straight onto the operand stack — and the reference interpreter models each lane with the matching rounding (Math.fround per f32 lane, i32/i64 wrap, byte-exact bitselect), so the headline branchless SIMD-Mandelbrot example (four pixels per step, escape counts accumulated through a compare mask) is proven identical to the wasm at every level. All told the differential oracle now runs 836 checks across -O0..-O3. NEWEST: A FROM-SCRATCH WEBASSEMBLY VM — a third, independent engine that runs the compiled program. It decodes the very bytes the backend assembled (an independent binary decoder: LEB128, every section, re-validating the encoder) and executes them on a hand-written stack machine — full dispatch for every numeric op on i32/i64/f32/f64, the conversions and saturating truncations, 128-bit SIMD, structured control flow, linear memory, globals, the funcref table + call_indirect, and the print imports — with i64 as BigInt and f32 as Math.fround so it matches wasm bit-for-bit. It joins the cross-check: every Verify run now proves V8 = reference interpreter = this VM (836 checks), a far stronger guarantee than two engines agreeing, and a dedicated harness reports the VM retired ~147.7M instructions exercising 157 distinct opcodes across the corpus. The same machine, stepped one instruction at a time, powers a new WASM VM TIME-TRAVEL DEBUGGER: step / step-back / run over the real bytecode with the executing instruction highlighted in a live disassembly and panels for the operand stack, locals, call stack, globals and a linear-memory hexdump — watch the actual compiled wasm execute, and rewind. NEWEST: OPERATOR STRENGTH REDUCTION ON INDUCTION VARIABLES (OSR) — the classic Cooper-Simpson-Vick transformation, the one loop optimization Strata was missing. On a loop the unroller can't touch (a runtime or large trip count), a multiply (or shift) of an induction variable by a loop-invariant region constant — the `i*stride` of an array address, a polynomial term — would otherwise run EVERY iteration. OSR replaces it with a NEW induction variable advanced by an ADDITION each iteration (init*r in the preheader, stepped by c*r per latch), the exact move that turns base + i*stride into a running pointer bump. It is an exact identity in the wrapping ring Z/2^w — (i±c)*r ≡ i*r ± c*r (mod 2^w), shifts as r=2^(k mod w) — so the result is byte-for-byte what -O0 computes; floats are excluded because FP rounding breaks distributivity. It handles i32 and i64 IVs, multiple latches, decrementing IVs, negative and loop-invariant-variable region constants, and several candidates per loop, declining whenever a precondition is unrecognized so it can only ever strengthen the code. Proven by the three-engine oracle (V8 = interpreter = VM) AND an offline fuzz of 9,600 random loops (OSR firing on 71%, zero mismatches); the corpus now runs 884 differential checks across -O0..-O3, OSR firing on 91 of 221 programs. NEWEST: LOOP UNSWITCHING — the loop optimization that attacks control flow. When a loop body branches on a loop-INVARIANT condition (a runtime flag whose single SSA definition lies outside the loop, so it never changes across iterations), re-deciding the branch every iteration is pure waste. Unswitching turns the loop inside-out: it hoists the test ABOVE the loop and clones the loop into two specialized, branch-free versions — `for { if (C) A else B }` becomes `if (C) { for { A } } else { for { B } }` — then the following SCCP/DCE/CFG-simplify rounds delete each clone's dead arm. It is the one LICM, if-conversion and unrolling could not get (LICM hoists the condition but not the branch; if-conversion only flattens a diamond to a still-per-iteration select; unrolling needs a constant trip count), and it composes with all of them — the two clean clones then unroll/stride/vectorize. A LICM pass runs first to lift the in-loop condition icmp into the preheader so the branch reads as invariant. Sound by the same structured-loop precondition the unroller uses (single preheader; the header conditional is the loop's one exit), which makes the exit SSA repair exact — every escaping value is a header def, merged back at the single exit with a fresh phi — and it declines whenever a precondition is unmet, so a bug can only miss an opportunity, never miscompile. A runtime-flagged loop's preheader now tests the flag once and feeds two branch-free clones whose results merge at the exit, proven identical by the three-engine oracle (V8 = interpreter = VM) AND a seeded fuzz of 240 random loops-with-invariant-branches (unswitching firing on every -O2/-O3 compile, zero mismatches); the full differential battery now runs 1068 checks across -O0..-O3. NEWEST: CODE SINKING (partial dead-code elimination) — the dual of LICM. A pure value computed before a two-way branch but used on only ONE arm was still computed on every path, the result thrown away whenever the other arm ran. Sinking pushes it DOWN into the arm that needs it — `t = a*a+b*b; if (cond) { use t } else { … }` becomes `if (cond) { t = a*a+b*b; use t } else { … }` — so the other path never computes it, and t's live range shrinks (easing the stackifier). Where LICM lifts invariants out of a loop, sinking pushes conditionally-used values into the branch that uses them. Sound by precondition: the target arm must be entered only from the branch block (so the value's operands, available there, survive the move), every use must be dominated by that arm, the value must not feed a phi (whose use is on a predecessor edge), and it refuses to sink into a deeper loop nest so it never pessimizes — moving work off a path, never changing a result. Proven by the three-engine oracle (V8 = interpreter = VM) AND a seeded fuzz of 240 random programs with a value used on only one arm (sinking firing on 212 of the -O2/-O3 compiles, zero mismatches); the full differential battery now runs 1080 checks across -O0..-O3. NEWEST: CODE HOISTING (very-busy / partially-redundant expressions) — sinking's mirror. When BOTH arms of a branch begin by computing the same pure value, GVN/CSE can't dedupe it (neither arm dominates the other, so it's a partial not a dominating redundancy) and if-conversion only helps when both arms are pure and small. Hoisting pulls one copy UP above the branch — `if (cond) { e = a*a+b*b; … } else { e = a*a+b*b; … }` becomes `e = a*a+b*b; if (cond) { … } else { … }` — so it runs once instead of on each path. Together the four directions of code motion are now covered: LICM lifts invariants up out of a loop, unswitching hoists an invariant branch above a loop, sinking pushes a one-arm value down into its arm, and hoisting pulls a both-arms value up out of them. Sound by the same single-pred precondition as sinking (each arm entered only from the branch block, so a value computed there is available wherever the originals were) with only pure, branch-block-available operands eligible — so it never adds a path, only removes a duplicate; sub-expression chains lift over successive fixpoint rounds. Proven by the three-engine oracle (V8 = interpreter = VM) AND a seeded fuzz of 240 random programs whose two arms share an expression (hoisting firing on every -O2/-O3 compile, zero mismatches); the full differential battery now runs 1088 checks across -O0..-O3. NEWEST: A SOURCE-LEVEL DEBUGGER FOR THE COMPILED WASM — the compiler now emits debug info (a DWARF-lite line table) and the from-scratch WebAssembly VM becomes a real source debugger. Source spans are threaded from the AST through the IR (each instruction and each conditional/return terminator), preserved across SSA construction and the optimizer's clones, and the backend builds a line table INSIDE the byte encoder — exactly one source location per emitted wasm instruction, in the same order the disassembler reads them back, so the mapping is the decoder's inverse (1:1 by construction, not a heuristic). The VM consumes it: single-step the REAL, optimized bytecode and the matching source line lights up live in the editor; click line numbers (or disassembly Lnn badges) to set breakpoints and ⛒ continue runs the machine until it hits one; the disassembly tags every instruction with its source line and highlights the whole group an instruction came from, so you watch one line of source become N instructions — and watch the optimizer delete/merge them as you raise -O (84% of instructions map at -O0). Stepping into the Strata runtime library (__strcat, the transcendental kernels, Dragon4) is labelled as such rather than pointing at a phantom line. The line table is pure metadata that changes no emitted byte, so the three-engine differential oracle (V8 = interpreter = VM) is untouched and still agrees byte-for-byte at every level — 1096 checks — while a new dedicated harness proves the table itself: 6459 line-table checks across 4767 functions at -O0..-O3 (alignment, source-bounds, coverage, plus a live step/breakpoint test), all green.
